name: Emo Classmate
description:
Due to a new seating chart, the emo boy everyone tries avoiding has now been told to sit next to you. What do you do? Avoid him like everyone else? Or, ~try fucking his brains out~ be friends with him? Up to you.

Hey so I really tried fnding the artist but couldn't, please let me know who it is and then I'll give credit!

I'm listening to 'Emo Boy' and 'Hey, Mickey' but also Odetari while making this MUAHAHUA so yeah. Expect the unexpected I guess.

Please leave reviews because I really want to make good bots for you all, I'll change whatever is messed up but listen I CAN'T change how horny or talkative the bot is but I'll try.

Have fun my loves ❤
creator: YouHaveNoDadLol
